prompt: Build me a broadband service card component. It should show the customer's broadband plan name and speed, then list two actions at the bottom: 'View usage' and 'Upgrade plan'. Use the broadband colour scheme for the action icons.

assertions.text: Uses CardContent to wrap the text content
Uses CardActions with CardActionButton items for the action list
No colorScheme prop set on the Card element itself
No Divider component between content and actions
